mvp_features.title: Session Timer & State Machine
acceptance: User can start a habit session and receive a session_id
Floor reached posts award 1 token and triggers haptic/visual feedback
Continue prompt shown at floor; user can proceed to target or stop
Session complete summarizes floor/target and score impact
DND is enabled during floor phase when supported
Server is source of truth for timestamps to handle clock skew

mvp_features.title: Quiet Hours & Sleep Protection
acceptance: Default quiet hours set to 22:00-07:00; user can adjust
No nudges or prompts during quiet hours
Late-night salvage protections applied; nighttime salvage rate stays under 5% KPI
DND integrations attempt enablement at session start; fallback to respectful prompt

mvp_features.title: Privacy-First Proofs (Opt-in, Local)
acceptance: Proofs default to self_attest; stronger proofs are opt-in with explicit consent
Photo proofs store only hashes locally; no image uploads without consent
Proof retention is capped at 24-72 hours and auto-deletes
Privacy settings enforce denials by default for unknown actions

mvp_features.title: Habit Creation & Limits
acceptance: Users can create habits with cadence and timing presets
System enforces max_active_habits=3 by default
Habits have floor/target/stretch timing and per-habit proof mode
GET suggestions returns EMA-based floor adjustment proposal with effective_date

mvp_features.title: Adaptive Floor (EMA-based)
acceptance: Nightly job evaluates floor adjustments with raise/lower thresholds
Never raises floor above 80% of target and respects cooldowns
Adjustments logged to floor_history with emaSnapshot
Automated changes are reversible via weekly review

mvp_features.title: Token Rewards (Predictable, No Gambling)
acceptance: Floor awards deterministic token increments with capacity limits
Cosmetic/story unlocks are triggered predictably based on token counts
No lootbox or randomized paid mechanics affecting score
Quiet periods can accrue invisible tokens without UI spam

mvp_features.title: Offline Sync & Conflict Resolution
acceptance: Client queues events offline and syncs when online
Conflicts resolved using merge/keep_both rules for overlapping sessions
Batch sync endpoint accepts multiple client events and returns per-event results
Idempotent deduplication by session_id on server

mvp_features.title: Heat-Based Nudging (Passive Defaults)
acceptance: Nudges only shown when heat is within 0.2-0.7
Respects DND, calendar busy status, and per-habit nudge frequency caps
Messages are gentle and competence-reinforcing
Disabled during quiet hours by policy

mvp_features.title: Onboarding to First Trial Session
acceptance: Avatar selection, 1-3 habits chosen, quiet hours set
Preset selection with optional review & edit
“Try it now” launches a 60s floor session and awards 1 token on completion
Flow target duration 75-85 seconds for a typical user

mvp_features.title: Multi-Device Session Handling
acceptance: Concurrent sessions for same habit are accepted and flagged for review
Server timestamp is canonical; client durations adjusted for skew
30s heartbeat maintains active session; idle >5m considered inactive
User warning when another device has an active session

milestones.name: Foundations & Auth
deliverables: User service with OAuth2 + JWT refresh
Users table with privacy settings and keys
PrivacyManager scaffolding and consent flows
Basic CI with unit test harness

milestones.name: Core Sessions & Habit CRUD
deliverables: POST /sessions/start, /sessions/{id}/floor_reached, /sessions/{id}/complete
POST /habits, GET /habits, PATCH /habits/{id}
SessionStateMachine with DND hooks and deep link open
DB migrations for users, habits, session_events, token_buckets

milestones.name: EMA & Rewards
deliverables: Nightly EMA batch with floor_history logging
Token bucket service with unlock triggers
GET /habits/{id}/suggestions
KPI instrumentation for start latency and restart latency

milestones.name: Offline Sync & Multi-Device
deliverables: POST /sync/batch with conflict results
Conflict resolution policies (merge/keep_both/server_wins)
Heartbeat handling and concurrent-session warnings
Client-side offline queue with retries

milestones.name: Mobile MVP & Onboarding
deliverables: Home and Timer screens (floor/target), token award animations
Onboarding flow to first trial session
Quiet hours enforcement and nudge safeguards
End-to-end tests for first completion
